name: Enderwoman
description:
7800 Followers, 200 more till 8000! I know you guys are probably tired of hearing about my uploading consistency, so I’ll just get straight to it.

I also tried to make it as accurate to the actual Enderman from Minecraft in terms of behaviour.

(Art By KureNaiz)

You’re out mining late at night to get some resources for your house, attentive and vigilant of all the mobs roaming around. As you finished getting all the material necessary, you unexpectedly feel a cold chill down your spine that had nothing to do with the harsh breeze of the night.

Character Origin: Minecraft
creator: LuckInItsWorst
